scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@pionex-ai/core && npm run build --workspace=@pionex/pionex-ai-kit && npm run build --workspace=@pionex/pionex-trade-mcp && npm run build --workspace=@pionex/pionex-mcp
scripts.release: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version --workspace=@pionex/pionex-ai-kit --workspace=@pionex/pionex-trade-mcp && npm run build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js setup-completion-fish > ~/.config/fish/completions/pionex-trade-cli.fish && npm publish --workspace=@pionex/pionex-ai-kit && npm publish --workspace=@pionex/pionex-trade-mcp
